name: Tu-160M Blackjack
description: Modernized Russian supersonic strategic bomber and the largest combat aircraft in service. Carries cruise missiles for standoff nuclear and conventional strikes.

specialAbilities.name: Standoff Cruise Missile Launch
specialAbilities.description: Launches Kh-101 cruise missiles from outside enemy air defense range, striking targets up to 5,500 km away.

specialAbilities.name: Supersonic Dash
specialAbilities.description: Variable-geometry wings allow Mach 2+ supersonic sprint to evade interceptors during ingress or egress.
